stakes.description: Marcus's desire for a quiet, low-stress life
The company's enterprise SLAs and data integrity
The collapse of the company's infrastructure and the careers of the engineering team

protagonistDesires.goal: Maintain anonymity and avoid corporate responsibility
Maintain control and save the company's reputation
Secure the best talent to fix the failing infrastructure

themeDeliveries.theme: Competence creates its own burden of responsibility
themeDeliveries.location: Marcus's internal struggle and eventual decision to fix the system

themeDeliveries.theme: Corporate hierarchy values optics over actual solutions
themeDeliveries.location: Richard's reaction to the crisis and his focus on the board's perception

conflicts.description: Marcus's desire for peace vs his professional integrity
The engineering team vs the failing infrastructure

premiseCounterPremise.premise: True expertise cannot hide from the demands of the world
premiseCounterPremise.counterPremise: One can escape the pressures of success by choosing a simpler life
